subject: Add SDC Client register logic support
commit_message:
Add SDC Client register logic support

* Add PssdController to do initialize and close
* Add PssdNotification to register a callback functional which to be
  called once there is one notification from SDC/DMAAP automatically
* Add Final/DistributionStatusMessage to compose a message to send
  back to DMAAP/SDC
* rename PSSD to Pssd to avoid compile complain
* add unit test cases to mimic Distribution client behavior
* integration into the SdcReceptionHandler so it could be controller from
  the high level

Change-Id: I6a40500914ec03d49e90c0f5519e8c556da0fc2e
Issue-ID: POLICY-956
Signed-off-by: liboNet <libo.zhu@intel.com>

Libo, there seem to be many fixes and new code in here. The fixes for checkstyle are great. But ONAP developer best practices are for a single JIRA. So you need to break this up and submit fixes that are specific to each JIRa. One for sonar/checkstyle, one for IConfiguration and I know there is another separate JIRA for the INotificationCallback.
